title: Schedule of Powers
contentHtml:
§Railway Board’s letter No.  2018/Trans/01/ Policy dt. 24/07/2018

§MODEL SCHEDULE OF POWERS (SOP)- 2018 w.e.f. 30/07/2018

MODEL SOP-2018 (CHAPTERWISE) 

§Front page

§Works Matters (PART – A)

§Medical Matters (PART – B)

§Miscellaneous Matters (PART – C)

§Stores Matters (PART – D)

§Commercial Matters (PART – E)

§Establishment Matters (PART – F)

§Security Matters (PART – G)

§Annexure-1

§Annexure-2

 

Railway Board’s Amendment
